user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new office closure, so that employees are not expected to work during closed periods
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Office Closure screen; When I click Add new office closure and enter a reason, from date, to date, locations and departments; Then the closure is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to specify the locations and departments affected by an office closure, so that the closure applies only to the relevant employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding an office closure; When I select the applicable locations and departments; Then the closure is scoped to those locations and departments

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view existing office closures with reason, from date, to date, locations and departments, so that I can review scheduled closures
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Office Closure screen; When closures exist; Then each row shows reason, from date, to date, locations and departments

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the office closure list, so that I can see the most recent closures
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Office Closure screen; When I click Refresh; Then the closure list reloads with current data
